description: You can execute these commands from the Cortex XSOAR CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
name: dnstwist-domain-variations

outputs.description: Domain name variations. dnstwist.Domain.Domains.IP IP addresses that resolved to domain name variations.
outputs.name: dnstwist.Domain.Domains.Name

outputs.description: Mail exchange records that resolved to domain name variations. dnstwist.Domain.Domains.DNS-NS Server names that resolved to domain name
outputs.name: dnstwist.Domain.Domains.DNS-MX

outputs.description: . dnstwist.Domain.Domains.WhoisUpdated Whois updated for domain name
outputs.name: variations

outputs.description: . dnstwist.Domain.Domains.WhoisCreated Whois created for domain name variations.
outputs.name: variations
